title: Request Smuggling, Response Splitting, Parser Differentials, and Downgrades · Language Lens: Response Splitting Defense
summary: A front end and origin disagree on length, whitespace, duplicate fields, target decoding, and line endings; the team tests each parser alone and forwards ambiguous messages after normalization. Planned artifact: Add and verify the response splitting defense increment in multi-recipient parser-consistency threat model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Prevent attacker-controlled CRLF and control bytes from creating new fields, responses, logs, caches, or downstream protocol records.
Compare raw and decoded targets, path separators, percent encodings, authority, query boundaries, and routing between policy and downstream recipients.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Response Splitting Defense · Theory Response Splitting Defense
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory protocol team handles case 9849 in a canary edge service advertising HTTP/3 with bounded fallback. Build deterministic Go evidence to reject framing and control-byte differentials before a message crosses recipients; preserve this operating constraint: the browser model cannot open a socket or claim packet-level proof; then split every structural delimiter across a different read and retain the same result. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only. Sockets, listeners, live TLS, proxies, packet capture, fuzz campaigns, races, load, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Prevent attacker-controlled CRLF and control bytes from creating new fields, responses, logs, caches, or downstream protocol records.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Response Splitting Defense contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Response Splitting Defense · Theory Response Splitting Defense.

For Predict Response Splitting Defense · Theory Response Splitting Defense, keep Response Splitting Defense connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
